questions.question: Who received this revelation from God?
questions.feedback: The revelation was given to Jesus Christ's servant John.

questions.question: How many churches does Jesus address in this book?
questions.feedback: The book is addressed to seven churches in Asia.

questions.question: John was on the island of Patmos when he received this revelation.
questions.feedback: John was on the island of Patmos because of the word of God and the testimony of Jesus.

questions.question: Jesus says I am the Alpha and the _____, the First and the Last.
questions.feedback: Jesus is the Alpha and the Omega, the beginning and the end.

questions.question: Blessed is the one who reads aloud the words of this _____, and blessed are those who hear it.
questions.feedback: Blessed is the one who reads and those who hear this prophecy.
